• Provides a full‑screen canvas game with mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, shop, and admin panel.
  • Implements procedural terrain, mining mechanics, upgrades, explosives, teleporter discovery, and host‑election logic for multiplayer.
  • Includes a configurable sound engine, custom texture system, save/auto‑save, cloud sync, and a modular UI/Modal framework.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Shop = new ShopSystem();

This HTML page creates a mining game with responsive UI, procedural world generation, and multiplayer features. It handles player actions, upgrades, and persistent saves, while offering sound, texture, and cloud sync options. The code is organized into distinct classes for game logic, shop, networking, UI, and utilities.
